intake_summary: OxFml W073 now treats typed_rule as the direct input contract for aggregate and visualization conditional-formatting metadata. The earlier W072 bounded threshold-string convention is intentionally ignored for those families, while scalar/operator/expression threshold text remains available where threshold text is the real rule input.
new_oxfml_evidence_observed: typed data-bar payload controls bounds, direction, and show-bar-only
typed icon-set payload uses explicit thresholds
typed rank and average payloads drive aggregate predicates
bounded visualization threshold strings are not interpreted
bounded aggregate option strings are not interpreted

oxcalc_w042_consequence.reason_no_core_engine_change: calc-czd.2 binds optimized/core counterpart and callable metadata evidence only. It does not construct DNA OneCalc conditional-formatting requests or change OxFml evaluator input metadata.
oxcalc_w042_consequence.required_guard: No W042 evidence may assume W072 bounded threshold strings are fallback metadata for the typed-only W073 aggregate and visualization families.

reason_no_oxcalc_handoff: The observed W073 change is already documented in OxFml's downstream-facing DNA OneCalc handoff. OxCalc currently records the guard and defers any seam-facing bridge uptake check to calc-czd.8 unless local evidence starts constructing the affected request families.
